mapper.select: SELECT order_no AS "orderNo", order_content AS "orderContent", order_point AS "orderPoint", amount AS "amount", order_state AS "orderState", order_date AS "orderDate", student_id AS "studentId", stock_no AS "stockNo" FROM orders WHERE order_no = ( SELECT order_no FROM orders WHERE stock_no = 3 AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = 'SELL' AND order_point = 1600 AND amount = 5 AND student_id != 'abc' ORDER BY order_date ASC LIMIT 1 ) FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (order_content, order_point, amount, order_state, order_date, student_id, stock_no) VALUES ('SELL', 1400, 2, 'PENDING', NOW(), 'def', 1)
mapper.select: SELECT order_no FROM ORDERS WHERE order_content = 'BUY' AND student_id = 'abc' AND stock_no = 1 AND order_state = 'MATCHED' AND amount = 10 AND order_point = 1050 ORDER BY order_date DESC
SELECT order_point, amount, order_content FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = 1 AND order_state = 'PENDING' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT order_point, amount, order_content FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = 3 AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = 'SELL' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT order_point, amount, order_content FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = 1 AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = 'BUY' ORDER BY order_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_state = '대기' WHERE order_no = 1
UPDATE orders SET order_state = '취소' WHERE order_no = 1
UPDATE orders SET order_state = '체결' WHERE order_no = 1
